title: Parties and Recitals
text: This Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of {{effective_date}} by and between {{party_1_name}} ("Party 1") and {{party_2_name}} ("Party 2") (collectively, the "Parties"). WHEREAS, the Parties desire to enter into this Agreement for lawful consideration and a lawful object under the Indian Contract Act, 1872; NOW, THEREFORE, in consideration of the mutual covenants and promises set forth herein, and other good and valuable consideration, the receipt and sufficiency of which are hereby acknowledged, the Parties agree as follows:
